findings.title: Class filter returns Showing: 0 for ALL 4 classes — gradebook has no data for ta@vocaboost.com
findings.evidence: All 4 class filters tested (25WT 2차 TOP ONLINE, 25WT 2차 CORE OFFLINE, 25WT 2차 CORE ONLINE, 25WT 2차 TOP OFFLINE) — every one returned Showing: 0 after 4+ second wait. Firestore requests are made. Teacher dashboard shows 36/66/37/63 students enrolled in these classes.
findings.repro:
1. Login as ta@vocaboost.com
2. /teacher/gradebook
3. Click "Class" chip
4. Type class name
5. Click "Add Filter"
6. Wait 5+ seconds
findings.expected: Student test submission records appear (Showing: N > 0)
findings.actual: Showing: 0 — "Your search returned no results" for all class filters
